title: Can't access Workflow feature?
excerpt:
My client would like to use the Workflow feature, however when clicking + on the workspace, there is no option to crate a Workflow? As described in this article it should be right there 


 
The article states it should …

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml:
My client would like to use the Workflow feature, however when clicking + on the workspace, there is no option to crate a Workflow? As described in this article it should be right there

Support

Get started: monday workflows

5 min read Feature   Who can use this feature: all monday.com subscribers Available on Standard + plans   monday.com workflows is your go-to tool for bringing all of the elements of y...

The article states it should be available to all “Standard + plans”. Does that mean the Standard plan and every plan above? or is there some special “Standard +” plan? If so, I can’t see a plan by that name in the plan options?

It’s very confusing when the system doesn’t match the instructions.

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately, this feature isn’t actually released for the general public yet. Those that do have the feature were granted access in the beta testing phase and probably got to keep it.

According to this post 2 weeks ago, the Monday team is hoping to get this feature released by end of the year

Workflows in Monday - I've seen instructions for them, when are they rolled out? Platform discussions
Hi everyone! Whilst this may be subject to change, the team are aiming to have the workflow builder (beta version) released, by the end of the year. I appreciate the demand for this release, and am working with our product team to communicate the information I can. Please rest assured that when release details are confirmed, the community will be the first to know

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Desmond. It would be great if Monday would make this clear since they showcased it as ‘released’ during their elevate keynote and have advertised it in their web article

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: check monday labs on top right corner by clicking on your avatar, things which are in beta can be activated from there.

posts.author: leonidas (Leonidas)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see it. Is it being rolled out to users slowly? Strange that a Pro user like myself which is also an Admin is still not able to see it.

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner:

things which are in beta can be activated from there.

Nope

posts.author: sherrycrist (Sherry Crist)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know if workflows are available in trial plans for business plus

posts.author: DylanDowns (Dylan Downs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Refer to the convo over here, as of today a lot of people still can’t access this feature.

https://community.monday.com/t/workflows-in-monday-ive-seen-instructions-for-them-when-are-they-rolled-out
